description_long: This is a long, double-ended polearm with a sleek, metallic shaft and pointed blades at both ends. One end features a black, leaf-shaped blade with a red and green ornamental accent at its base, while the opposite end has a smaller, similarly shaped black blade with a subtle gold detail. The shaft is primarily silver or light gray, tapering slightly toward each end and flanked by conical metallic fittings. The central section is smooth and unadorned, providing a clear grip area. The overall design is modern and stylized, with a balance of functional and decorative elements. The object appears sturdy and is likely constructed from metal, with colored accents for visual interest.
description: A double-ended polearm with black blades, silver shaft, and red-green ornamental accents. Sleek, metallic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, both black blades, and the red-green ornamentation near one blade.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow profile and the alignment of the blades along the shaft.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying both blades and the gold detail on the smaller blade's base.
description_view_3: End-on view from the other side, emphasizing the symmetry and the ornamental features.
attribute_blade_type: double-edged, straight, leaf-shaped blades at both ends
attribute_handle_design: smooth, straight metallic shaft with central grip area and conical fittings
attribute_ornamentation: red and green decorative accents near one blade, gold detail at opposite blade base
